title: The Crew Learns the World Has Changed
description: On pages 9–12, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The central beat is the crew learns the world has changed.
scene: The scene focuses on the crew learns the world has changed, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That guy was still hanging around?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What?! You're telling me that guy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I have a bad feeling about this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...treasure doesn't seem so important any more.

summary: The Crew Learns the World Has Changed. This part advances the end of the Fish-Man Island conflict and the island’s attempt to move beyond inherited hatred.
